name: Supermrket: El Videojuego de Gestión de Supermercado
short_description: Create your own market empire. Build stores, invest in new products, hire employees, expand your empire around the world... Enjoy your time being the best manager in the market!
detailed_description:
Welcome to the world of Supermrket! After choosing the difficulty level you want to start your empire from, you'll choose the logo you want to represent you and the person (male or female) you want to lead the way.

Upon moving to the main stage, three maps, weather effects, day and night cycles, and over a hundred objects await you to discover and implement in your market... and at the end of each day, a treasure chest will grant you an advantage or disadvantage that will help you advance to the next.

My intention is for the game to have the complexity of managing a real supermarket, covering aspects as simple as selling bags, different salary levels depending on the workload of warehouse workers or cashiers, and researching various types of products (both those typical of a supermarket and products as diverse as televisions, cars, computers... even products like those found in a movie theater in a large shopping center or travel agency). The aesthetic is simple in appearance, yet unique and with its own personality, in my opinion.

Only your imagination is the limit, so my intention is to create all kinds of themed products in the expansions, as well as to coincide with real-life celebrations (such as Valentine's Day, July 4th, Oktoberfest, St. Patrick's Day, etc.) until I create the largest product catalog ever imagined.

I recommend, please, reading the brief manual to enjoy and understand the experience and gameplay. And if you have any questions about how the game works, I'll be happy to answer them by emailing: . Thank you very much.

Welcome everyone to Supermrket, the Supermrket Management video game!
